heading: Principal office and meetings
label: 80105 Principal office and meetings

children.heading: .—Principal Office
children.label: a .—Principal Office
children.text: The principal office of the corporation shall be in the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Meetings
children.label: b .—Meetings
children.text: The corporation may hold its meetings at places outside the District of Columbia.
